name: workflow-wrapper
description: Hackathon CLI orchestration layer for treehouse, lavish, gnhf, and no-mistakes

scripts.install-skill: SKILL_DST="${WFW_SKILL_DIR:-$HOME/.agents/skills/wfw}"; mkdir -p "$SKILL_DST" && cp skills/wfw/SKILL.md "$SKILL_DST/SKILL.md" && echo "Installed /wfw skill to $SKILL_DST"
